programmes.show_description: A Swedish Science Thing. Sheldon invites the entire school to a party for the Nobel Prize announcements. Meanwhile, Meemaw learns more about Dr. Sturgis's past. S2, Ep22
Hard Knot Life. Jason lost confidence and motivation due to the large growth on his neck. Shawnell has multiple mystery bumps on her head that have destroyed her self-esteem. S4, Ep6
Eggs Lipoma. David is back to see Dr. Lee after she spotted a suspicious growth under his eye. And, Alan has a growth on his bicep but is terrified of doctors. S2, Ep12

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta
programmes.show_description: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo. Lacey is looking to show off her very large back tattoo and her mother wants it fully covered. Plus, Sasha honours her mother with a pink bridal gown. S2, Ep10
Rena & Lee's Story. Since meeting at a bariatric rehab centre in 2006, Lee and Rena's weight has skyrocketed. The couple now makes a second attempt to save their lives. S6, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Pleasing Everyone. Ciara wants glamour at her wedding. Can David find a dress fusing classic Irish and Essex bling? Cosplay fan Emily is torn between ball gown and princess-style. S1, Ep29

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Style Wars. Hannah wants a frock to shine for her New Year's wedding. Can David find one her picky mum will love? Midwifery student EJ longs to ditch her scrubs for a divine dress. S1, Ep30

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress Lancashire
programmes.show_description: Mum's Approval Is Everything. Bethany is dealing with a scary diagnosis so Gok gives her a fairytale moment with a stunning gown. And, Jacinthe's mum is a tough critic! S1, Ep1
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Cigar Talk. When Joyce invites Vince to attend her high school reunion, he confesses to Mike that he never graduated high school. S1, Ep22
Victoria's Birthday. Victoria panics as her 30th birthday approaches - and drags Mike and Molly into the drama of her life crisis. S1, Ep23
Peggy's New Beau. Mike feels pressured when Peggy's new boyfriend asks whether he and Molly hear wedding bells in their future. S1, Ep24
A Proposal And A Popsicle. Georgie is thrilled when Veronica stays at the Coopers' for a few days. Meanwhile, Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis celebrate their one-year anniversary. S2, Ep20
A Broken Heart. The Coopers help a broken-hearted Pastor Jeff through a rough patch in his marriage. Meanwhile, Sheldon pressures church members for donations. S2, Ep21
A Swedish Science Thing. Sheldon invites the entire school to a party for the Nobel Prize announcements. Meanwhile, Meemaw learns more about Dr. Sturgis's past. S2, Ep22
The Parking Spot Escalation. When the University reassigns Sheldon's unused parking spot to Howard, the ensuing turf battle affects the whole gang. S6, Ep9
The Fish Guts Displacement. Sheldon plays nursemaid to a sick Amy, while Howard attempts to bond with his father-in-law on an upcoming fishing trip. S6, Ep10
The Santa Simulation. Sheldon unwillingly revisits some Christmas memories during a lively game of Dungeons and Dragons, while Raj joins the girls for ladies' night out. S6, Ep11
The Egg Salad Equivalency. Sheldon is accused of sexual harassment at the University and winds up dragging Leonard, Raj and Howard into the fray. S6, Ep12
The Bakersfield Expedition. Leonard's car is stolen when the guys take a road trip to a comic book convention in Bakersfield, dressed as Star Trek characters. S6, Ep13
The Cooper/Kripke Inversion. Outraged that he's being forced to work with his university nemesis, Barry Kripke, Sheldon faces a crisis of conscience. S6, Ep14
The Spoiler Alert Segmentation. When Sheldon and Leonard fight, it affects Penny and Amy's living arrangements. Meanwhile, Raj takes care of Mrs. Wolowitz while Howard is away. S6, Ep15
The Tangible Affection Proof. While the guys try to give their significant others the perfect Valentine's Day, Raj and Stuart throw a lonely people party at the comic book store. S6, Ep16
Goin' Fishin'. Adjusting to life as an engaged couple, trouble arises when Molly wants to start planning the wedding and Mike wants to go fishing with the guys. S2, Ep1
Dennis's Birthday. Mike's mum, Peggy, is in for a big surprise when she celebrates her boyfriend, Dennis' birthday. S2, Ep2
Mike In The House. When Mike moves in with Molly and her family, he has to adjust from life in his bachelor pad to a house full of women. S2, Ep3
Quirky Eggheads. After Dr. Sturgis experiences a nervous breakdown, Mary worries Sheldon is headed down a similar path. Georgie finds he has a knack for sales. S3, Ep1
Broom Closet. Without Dr. Sturgis's university class, Sheldon takes his education into his own hands. Mary helps Pastor Jeff avoid temptation with his girlfriend. S3, Ep2
An Entrepreneurialist. Sheldon leaves town after a fight with Meemaw and his parents. Meanwhile, Georgie tries to impress Veronica with his new business venture. S3, Ep3
The Monster Isolation. After a terrible date, Raj vows to never leave his apartment again. Meanwhile, Penny actually impresses Sheldon with her acting skills. S6, Ep17
Contractual Obligation Implementation. Leonard, Sheldon and Howard try to advance the cause of women in science by speaking with junior high girls about their future careers. S6, Ep18
The Closet Reconfiguration. When Howard finds a letter from his father, he's forced to confront his past. And Leonard and Penny throw a grown-up cocktail party at the apartment. S6, Ep19
The Tenure Turbulence. Let the battle begin! Leonard, Sheldon and Raj fight for tenure at the University - and the competition heats up when the girls get involved! S6, Ep20
The Closure Alternative. After one of his favourite TV shows gets cancelled too soon, Sheldon feels lost, so Amy tries to help him get over his compulsive need for closure. S6, Ep21
The Proton Resurgence. Leonard and Sheldon hire Professor Proton, the host of their favourite childhood TV show, to perform. Raj leaves his dog with Howard and Bernadette. S6, Ep22
The Love Spell Potential. When the girls' trip to Vegas falls through, the guys invite them to a Dungeons & Dragons date. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy go on an awkward date. S6, Ep23
The Bon Voyage Reaction. When Leonard is offered an exciting new job opportunity overseas, Sheldon grows jealous. Raj pushes Lucy a little too far in their relationship. S6, Ep24

programmes.show_name: New: Ruby & Jodi: A Cult Of Sin and Influence
programmes.show_description: Truth And Distortion. Jessi Hildebrandt exposes their aunt Jodi's manipulation as survivors speak out and reveal her cult-like control and the lasting damage she causes. S1, Ep3

programmes.show_name: New: Ruby & Jodi: A Cult Of Sin and Influence
programmes.show_description: Honest, Responsible, Humble. Ruby Franke's journals expose abuse under Jodi Hildebrandt's influence. The court delivers justice, but questions remain - is her control truly over? S1,

programmes.show_name: Little Boy Lost: An ID Mystery
programmes.show_description: When a 7-year-old boy vanishes, investigators suspect his stepmother had a hand in his disappearance. Family secrets are exposed as the saga takes bizarre twists.
The Record Breaking Lump. Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialise. Meanwhile, a mother-daughter duo has bonded over their bumps. S2, Ep13
Adventures In Pimplepopping. Inoke has a huge and potentially life-threatening bulge on his shoulder. Delano returns to see Dr. Lee and Reed has hundreds of bumps all over his chest. S2, Ep14
Janine's Story. Janine's extreme obesity has left her nearly immobile. She must overcome her physical and emotional pain if she's ever going to live a normal life. S6, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: A Dress With Drama. West End star Michelle wants a timeless dress for her wedding at St Paul's Cathedral. Drama queen Lois seeks a theatrical style - can the team find a frock? S1, Ep33

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: My Wedding My Dress. Gemma wants a sexy dress for her exotic beach wedding but her friends are set on princess-style. Fatema has her final fitting but is the gown modest enough? S1, Ep34

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Love At First Gown. First-timer Rebecca is set on a glam gown but falls for her first dress, a princess gown picked by mum. Rhia wants a dramatic dress with cleavage - but not mum! S1, Ep35

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Outside The Box Frocks. Harry Potter fan Jodie wants her passion for it reflected in her dress. Gothic rocker Jennifer seeks a black dress for her masquerade ball reception. S1, Ep36
